steps.title: Find the dangling modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase "Having 11,486 feet of prominence" describes whatever follows the comma. It must describe the mountain, not the geographers.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
Only choice B starts with "Mount Hayes" as the subject — the mountain has the prominence.

A makes "geographers" the subject (geographers don't have 11,486 feet of prominence). C uses "the list," D uses "the ranking" — both create dangling modifiers.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
